UcoType.description: Top-level class for metaclasses within UCO. An instance of core:UcoType is also an instance of owl:Class, and is or specializes core:UcoThing. Disjoint from core:UcoThing. Added on the UCO 1.5.0 track in ucoProject/UCO PR #676 to anchor the metaclass hierarchy; forward-implemented here.

Technique.description: A metaclass: 'A technique is a class of actions joined by some common characteristics. uco-action:Technique itself is a metaclass. A Technique instance is an owl:Class that is a subclass of uco-action:Action.' Model a concrete technique (e.g. a MITRE ATT&CK technique such as T1543.003) as an owl:Class typed uco-action:Technique and rdfs:subClassOf uco-action:Action, carrying uco-action:techniqueID; a concrete action that exhibits it is an instance of (rdf:type) that technique class. Added in ucoProject/UCO PR #676 (rdfs:subClassOf uco-core:UcoType); forward-implemented here for UCO 1.5.0.

properties.name: techniqueID
properties.description: An identifier for a technique within some cataloguing system (e.g. the MITRE ATT&CK technique ID 'T1543.003'). Left Literal-valued and minimally described at the general UCO level; specializations of Technique should specialize a corresponding subproperty of techniqueID. Used only on Techniques.
